channel.title: GitHub ReScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of ReScript in GitHub

item.title: rescript-lang/rescript
item.description: ReScript is a robustly typed language that compiles to efficient and human-readable JavaScript.

item.title: juspay/hyperswitch-web
item.description: Hyperswitch Web SDK: A Rescript powered React library for seamless payment integration and customization.
